message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

class Project
class User
class Submission
class Admin
class Author
class Editor
class Revision
class Comment
class Resource
class Document
class AudioFile
class Video

Project "1" o-- "*" User
Project "1" *-- "*" Submission
Project "1" -- "1" Resource

Admin --|> User
Author --|> User
Editor --|> User

Submission "1" o-- "1" Author
Submission "1" *-- "*" Revision
Submission "1" *-- "1" Resource
Submission "1" -- "1" Editor

Author "1" -- "1" Editor

Editor "1" -- "1" Comment
Submission "1" -- "1*" Comment

Revision "1" o-- "1" Resource

Document --|> Resource
AudioFile --|> Resource
Video --|> Resource

@enduml
```
